name: Buddy Hackett
abstract: Buddy Hackett (born Leonard Hacker; August 31, 1924 – June 30, 2003) was an American comedian and comic actor. Known for his raunchy material, heavy appearance and thick New York City accent, his notable roles include Marcellus Washburn in The Music Man (1962), Benjy Benjamin in It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World (1963), Tennessee Steinmetz…

concerts.label: Tribute to Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.

about_quotes.speaker: Sol Yaged
about_quotes.evidence: I played in shows with people like Jackie Mason, Henny Youngman, Buddy Hackett, Don Rickles.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sol Yaged interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000
